hero.name: Karthika Arumugam
hero.title: Engineering Leader | AI-Enabled Enterprise Platforms
hero.subTitle: Scaling systems across 1,200+ locations with AI-ready, mission-critical platforms

about_me.resumeSummary: Engineering leader with 15+ years of experience building and scaling enterprise platforms, currently leading a 13-person engineering team across multiple mission-critical applications. Proven track record in modernizing legacy systems, delivering cloud-native solutions, and driving platform integrations across data, analytics, security, and AI-enabled workflows. Known for translating technical complexity into business outcomes, improving reliability, and leading cross-functional teams through large-scale transformation.
about_me.title: Engineering Leader - AI-Enabled Enterprise Platforms
about_me.subtitle: Scaling systems across global properties, complex operations, and AI-enabled workflows.
summary: I am an engineering leader focused on building reliable, scalable platforms that make everyday operations smoother for teams and customers. My work spans platform modernization, team leadership, AI-enabled developer tooling, and event-driven systems that power real-time experiences at enterprise scale.
background: I recently completed Applied Machine Learning and AI through Cornell University and have been applying that learning to platform strategy, AI-assisted delivery workflows, and data-driven product decisions.

My leadership approach combines technical depth with operational rigor. I focus on translating complex system tradeoffs into clear business outcomes, improving reliability, and helping teams grow as they modernize legacy environments.
about_me.hobbies:
When I’m not leading technical roadmaps or geeking out over technologies, I’m focused on my most important role: being a mom of two.
Parenthood has genuinely made me a stronger leader. It has refined my ability to prioritize under pressure, lead with deep empathy, and stay calm during "system outages"—whether they happen in a codebase or at the dinner table. You’ll often find us on family adventures, building STEM-focused LEGO robots, or in the middle of a "Project Runway: Toddler Edition" session where I put my crochet and knitting skills to use.
I am always learning, always building, and always ready for a new challenge—especially if it involves coffee, the cloud, or a creative DIY project.

certifications.name: Microsoft Specialist: Programming in HTML5 with JavaScript and CSS3
Professional Member
certifications.issuer: IAAP - International Association of Accessibility Professionals

leadership.philosophy: I believe in servant leadership—empowering teams, fostering trust, and enabling growth. My approach is to lead by example, encourage open communication, and create space for people to do their best work.
team_successes: Lead a 13-person engineering team delivering mission-critical applications across 1,200+ properties.
Consolidated 15+ legacy systems into one guest-services interface that cuts service interaction time in half.
Scaled AI-enabled developer tooling and event-driven infrastructure to support modern enterprise workflows.

testimonials.name: A. Smith
